github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use Conventional Commits. Reference exactly one linked plan task path when available. Keep subject imperative and under 72 characters.

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: Prioritize findings using AI Governance Gate wording and order. Verify these are explicitly satisfied: Spec updated or explicitly confirmed unchanged; Acceptance criteria validated with evidence; Architecture boundaries respected (domain/application/infrastructure/presentation); Convention checks respected (unwrap/expect/panic not introduced, tracing used for observability); Tests added or updated for changed behavior. Also verify exactly one linked plan task line in the form '- Path: docs/Maestro_Execution_Plans/tasks/<task>.md', and ensure each AC ID in Acceptance Criteria has matching evidence in Validation Evidence.
